note: High-speed lifts to the accessible main observation deck and glass floor; the EdgeWalk is not accessible but the decks are. Book timed entry.
Fully accessible with lifts, step-free entrance, loaner wheelchairs and accessible toilets. Flat galleries throughout.
The ferries have step-free/ramped boarding and the island paths are flat and paved; beaches and parkland with accessible routes. A relaxed accessible day trip.
Step-free entrances, lifts to all levels, loaner wheelchairs; the Gehry-designed galleries are flat and easy.
The main market is largely at ground level with lift access between floors; aisles are navigable though busy on Saturdays. Accessible with care.
A pedestrian Victorian district paved in historic cobblestones that are charming but jarring and uneven for wheels and strollers; shops and cafes are mostly step-free once inside.
A flat, paved, step-free lakeside promenade with ramps and accessible facilities; easy and scenic for strolling and wheeling.
Fully accessible with flat step-free galleries, ramps and a moving walkway through the tunnel; excellent for families and wheelchairs.
A flat, walkable bohemian neighborhood; sidewalks and streets are largely step-free though narrow and busy, and some shops have a step. Broadly manageable.
A hilltop Gothic mansion; the main floor has an accessible entrance and route but the towers and some levels are stair-only and the grounds are sloped. Partly accessible.
A large park with many flat paved paths, accessible facilities and a zoo, though some trails are hilly and unpaved. Choose the paved routes for easy access.
